text: Probably not what you're looking for but there is a demo of Eve where they build a bouncing ball simulation: <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zenELksXotI>

text: This is nice too - but I think there was something else.. <@UBKNXPBAB> wasn't there a cannonball demo in the programming tool whose name I forgot that you showed a couple of times? (something starting from A...?)

elements.text: This is nice too - but I think there was something else..
wasn't there a cannonball demo in the programming tool whose name I forgot that you showed a couple of times? (something starting from A...?)

text: Oh gosh – I always wanted to add a cannonball thing to Apparatus (as a test case for creating & destroying objects), but I never got around to that. Is it possible that’s what you’re thinking of?

elements.text: Oh gosh – I always wanted to add a cannonball thing to Apparatus (as a test case for creating & destroying objects), but I never got around to that. Is it possible that’s what you’re thinking of?

text: Ah, yes, it was certainly Apparatus I was thinking of, thanks! I was thinking I saw a projectile motion of some kind demo in it? But perhaps not...
